title: 50pcs Reusable Plastic Straws,Drinking Straws with Cleaning Brush,Dishwasher Safe,Straws Drinking Plastic for Family Bars Cafes Restaurants BBQ Parties Celebrations
features: Durable Drinking Straws:Reusable straws made from smooth, sturdy pp material, and don’t impart any ‘taste’ to the drink,Also will not break into pieces, much eco friendly and safer than Other plastic straws/paper straws and those easy broken glass straws

Package contents: You get 50PCS striped drinking straw plastic and 1-cleaning brush, the length of the straws is about 23 cm, the outer diameter is about 7.3mm and the inner diameter is about 6.3mm,used for cold and hot drinks

Safety Materials:These reusable plastic straws are BPA-free, non-toxic, and safe for both adults and children, making them a great choice for families who want to reduce their plastic waste while still enjoying the convenience of a straw

Candy-Striped Straws : Colorful Stripes Our reusable straws are available in a rainbow of beautiful stripes, suitable for cups of different sizes, and the bottom end of the straw can be cut to a suitable length as desired

Wide Use Straws:These straws can withstand multiple uses and are dishwasher safe,straws are great for daily and celebrations use like family gathering, wedding, birthday, outside barbecue, picnic and other big events
